news_items.headline: Pete Crow-Armstrong leads all NL players in the SABR Defensive Index
news_items.summary: The Society for American Baseball Research has created something called their Defensive Index, rating players for their defense using a number of different criteria, which you can read about in detail here. The SDI is used, in part, to help decide each year’s Gold Glove and Platinum Glove winners. SABR announced today that Pete Crow-Armstrong […]

news_items.summary: Hey, at least the Florida Complex League Red Sox scored 26 runs on Thursday?

news_items.summary: Keeping track of the 40-man roster, one roster move at a time.

news_items.headline: MLB Player Props & Best Bets for Today, June 12
news_items.summary: Colby Marchio's favorite MLB player props and best bets for Friday, June 12, include Kyle Schwarber, Kody Clemens and Samuel Basallo.

news_items.headline: Today in Blue Jays History: Jays Comeback From Down 8-1 against Red Sox
news_items.summary: 11 years ago today: The Blue Jays made a fantastic comeback to beat the Red Sox in Boston. It would be our 9th win in a row. We would sweep the Red Sox, running our winning streak to 11. At the end of 3 innings, the Jays were down 8-1. Drew Hutchison had a terrible […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers 2026 injured list tracker
news_items.summary: This is your one-stop shop for every Dodgers stint on the injured list during the 2026 season. We’ll also include every time a player misses time on the paternity list, bereavement leave, or is on the family medical emergency list as well. Basically any time a player misses time that requires a roster move, we’ll […]

news_items.summary: Happy 52nd birthday to the 2009 World Series MVP.

news_items.headline: Dodgers injuries are piling up
news_items.summary: Will Smith placed on IL, Shohei Ohtani & Justin Wrobleski hurt. Chuckie Robinson called up, Tyler Fitzgerald released

news_items.summary: A number of teams and stars are still struggling two months into the season. Do their slow starts define who they are in 2026?

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Ohtani exits early with knee inflammation...
news_items.summary: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani exited in the seventh inning of Thursday's win at Pittsburgh with knee inflammation, but manager Dave Roberts said the move was precautionary.

news_items.headline: Skubal rejoins Tigers' rotation Sat. vs. Guardians...
news_items.summary: Tarik Skubal will start Saturday's game against the Guardians, as the ace left-hander rejoins the Tigers less than six weeks after elbow surgery.

news_items.headline: Chapman: If Yanks want me, GM should apologize
news_items.summary: If the Yankees were to acquire Red Sox closer Aroldis Chapman, he would like New York GM Brian Cashman to apologize to him for how his previous stint with the team ended.

news_items.headline: Red Sox prez: Breslow safe amid 'awful' season
news_items.summary: Red Sox president Sam Kennedy called the team's play this season "embarrassing and unacceptable," but said there's been no consideration of removing Craig Breslow from his role as chief baseball officer.

news_items.headline: Phils add OF depth, acquire Hill from White Sox
news_items.summary: The Phillies, seeking outfield depth after Adolis Garcia left Wednesday's game because of a shoulder injury, acquired Derek Hill in a trade with the White Sox.

news_items.headline: Ohtani rues non-challenge as LA blows 5-run lead
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani cruised through the first six innings Wednesday before things unraveled in the seventh, including a missed ABS challenge that helped the Pirates rally and set the stage for a 9-8 win over the Dodgers.

news_items.headline: Pirates' Cruz lands on IL with broken left hand
news_items.summary: Pirates outfielder Oneil Cruz went on the 10-day injured list Wednesday after tests revealed non-displaced fractures between his ring finger and his pinkie.
